description: Reviewed exceptions to the tenant fail-open static audit (scripts/audit-tenant-queries.mjs). One entry per file grandfathers existing fail-open patterns so CI blocks NEW regressions while migration proceeds. APPROVED = intentional platform/super-admin scope. PENDING-MIGRATION = known debt, still a production blocker.

exceptions.reason: Platform/ops or cross-tenant reporting surface; requireTenantId()-style guard throws for non-SUPER_ADMIN, so the ternary only relaxes scope for an authenticated SUPER_ADMIN with an explicit active tenant. Fail-open literal retained pending refactor to explicit platform-scope decorator.

Platform/ops or cross-tenant reporting surface; requireTenantId()-style guard throws for non-SUPER_ADMIN, so the ternary only relaxes scope for an authenticated SUPER_ADMIN with an explicit active tenant. Fail-open literal retained pending refactor to explicit platform-scope decorator.

Actor-based service. TenantContextGuard forces a resolvable tenant for non-SUPER_ADMIN before these run, so normal-user paths are fail-closed at the boundary. Literal fail-open remains for SUPER_ADMIN cross-tenant and internal calls; scheduled for requireTenantId() migration.
